description:
Binary lookup duplicated 4+ times:
- agent-runner/runner/process_builder.rs:52 (is_command_on_path)
- agent-runner/providers/mod.rs:71 (is_cli_available)
- orchestrator-core/services/runner_helpers.rs:387 (lookup_binary_in_path)
- orchestrator-cli/services/operations/ops_model/status.rs:50 (lookup_binary_in_path)
- orchestrator-cli/services/tui/app_state.rs:339 (lookup_binary_in_path)
- llm-cli-wrapper uses `which::which` crate directly

All wrap `which` or `Command::new("which")`. Should be one utility.

Also: CliInvocation (agent-runner/process_builder.rs:6) and LaunchInvocation (llm-cli-wrapper/cli/launch.rs:13) are structurally identical structs. agent-runner already depends on llm-cli-wrapper — should use LaunchInvocation directly instead of converting field-by-field.

Also: ensure_flag/ensure_flag_value duplicated between agent-runner/process.rs and llm-cli-wrapper/launch.rs. ensure_codex_config_override has 3 implementations (agent-runner/process.rs, shared/runner.rs, daemon_scheduler_runtime_support.rs).
title: Deduplicate binary-on-PATH lookup and parallel CliInvocation/LaunchInvocation types
